title: Li Auto Q4 2022 Earnings Preview
text: Li Auto reported financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2022 on February 27, 2023. Analysts expected Li Auto to report revenue of RMB 18 billion, gross margin of 21.1 percent and adjusted earnings per share of 0.45 in the fourth quarter. Li Auto delivered 46,319 vehicles in the fourth quarter, within the guidance range of 45,000 to 48,000 vehicles. The company had given fourth-quarter revenue guidance of RMB 16.51 billion to RMB 17.61 billion when it announced its third-quarter earnings. Analysts said Li Auto was expected to report solid results for the fourth quarter, with margins likely to rise and auto margins recovering to around 21 percent. In contrast to competitors like Nio, Li Auto had managed the launch of its latest models, the Li L8 and Li L9, very effectively in recent months, capturing the initial wave of demand.
